name: openjam
description: Open-source jam.dev alternative: Chrome MV3 extension capturing console/network/errors/screenshots/device + rrweb session replay on one timeline, exported as a self-contained HTML bug report.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -r openjam.zip manifest.json LICENSE background.js issue-link.js popup.html popup.js viewer.html viewer.js renderer.js report-builder.js icons dist src/generated
